IT.failure: ERROR: Failed to execute on remote machine vmbuild
IT.solution: vmbuild server might not be reachable, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: Write failed: Broken pipe
IT.solution: Server node crashed or NFS encountered some problem, please reach out to IT with logs.

IT.failure: Connection closed by
IT.solution: Server went offline for some reason, please reach out to IT with logs.

IT.failure: ERROR: Failed to execute on remote machine ovabuild
IT.solution: ovabuild server might not be reachable, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: cp: cannot stat
IT.solution: NFS encountered some problem, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: Connection timed out
IT.solution: Process timed out on the server, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: repo/path/codegen.py: No such file or directory
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: repo/path/codegen.py': [Errno 2] No such file or directory
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/ftp-path/repo/build/pybuild/core/target.py'
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'toolscache'
IT.solution: toolscache service might have landed into some issue, please reach out to IT/DevOps.

IT.failure: gpg: can't open `/ftp-path/repo/build/keys/netintact.gpg': No such file or directory
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: repo/build/keys/netintact.gpg': No such file or directory
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: Stale file handle
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue or parallel threads would've performed cleanup in same workspace, please reach out to IT/DevOps.

IT.failure: mktemp: failed to create directory via template
IT.solution: NFS might have encountered some issue, please reach out to IT

IT.failure: repo/d_packetlogic-3410369bfcac63d97b5d2078d61ccf22386cf6b7.tar.gz' for reading: No such file or directory
IT.solution: packetlogic compilation failed, please reach out to IT/DevOps with logs.

IT.failure: python2.7: No such file or directory
IT.solution: Python2.7 environment needs to be fixed on build server. Please reach out to IT/DevOps with logs.

IT.failure: .mod: 404 Not Found
IT.solution: Artifactory might not have relevant golang package, please investigate if you've changed anything w.r.t golang package and if that exists in Artifactory.

IT.failure: jenkins-20 port 22: No route to host
IT.solution: host is offline, please contact IT.

IT.failure: remote: GitLab is not responding
IT.solution: GitLab is down, create a Helpdesk ticket with logs.

IT.failure: error: Bad Request - [Error] remote: GitLab is not responding
IT.solution: GitLab is down, create a Helpdesk ticket with logs.

IT.failure: mod: net/http: TLS handshake timeout
IT.solution: Artifactory might not have relevant golang package, please investigate if you've changed anything w.r.t golang package and if that exists in Artifactory.

IT.failure: =x509: certificate signed by unknown authority
IT.solution: Certificate issue on server, please reach out to IT with logs.

IT.failure: mkdir: cannot create directory '/ftp/data/obj': No such file or directory
IT.solution: Problem with jfile NFS, please reach out to IT.

IT.failure: docker.errors.BuildError: No such image:
IT.solution: Either the image defined in Dockerfile is wrong, or it could be a docker cleanup issue. Raise a bug for IT/DevOps to investigate cleanup policies if you know that the Dockerfile has correct image.

Product.solution: Compilation failed for the given target, please check 'make' errors to find dependencies.
Unknown reference in code, review again and fix compilation.
Unknown member variable in code changes, review again and fix compilation.

Product.failure: was not declared in this scope
Product.solution: Unknown scope for some variable in code changes, review again and fix compilation.
Docker build failed, check logs and fix compilation dependencies.
Failed to build target, check make compilation failure and fix.
Failed to build target, check make compilation failure and fix.
Failed to build target, check make compilation failure and fix.
Failed to build target, check make compilation failure and fix.
Failed to build target, check make compilation failure and fix.

Product.failure: has no non-static data member named 'copy_direct'
Product.solution: There is some error w.r.t a data member, check logs and fix compilation.

Devops.solution: Job got aborted somehow, retrigger or reach out to DevOps.
Running process was aborted, retrigger or reach out to DevOps.
Failed to create workspace, reach out to DevOps.
Failed to create docker tarball, reach out to DevOps.
Found an authentication issue, reach out to DevOps.

Devops.failure: npm ERR! EBUSY: resource busy or locked
Devops.solution: NPM failure due to concurrent processes, check logs or reach out to DevOps.
Running process was aborted, retrigger or reach out to DevOps.
build-pl2 llvm package build failed, check with DevOps on cached packages.

Devops.failure: docker.errors.BuildError: failed to export image: failed to set parent
Devops.solution: Failed to create docker build, reach out to DevOps.
Corrupted tarball created, check logs or reach out to DevOps.

Devops.failure: Error writing blob: Error uploading layer chunked: StatusCode: 408
Devops.solution: Timed out while uploading image, check the size of image being built and find areas of improvement. For further assistance, reach out to DevOps/IT.
Make build compilation failed for clean target, remove dirs manually or reach out to DevOps.

Devops.failure: gzip: stdin: decompression OK, trailing garbage ignored
Devops.solution: Garbage/Corrupted gzip package, try re-running or reach out to DevOps if this is consistent.

Devops.failure: gzip: stdin: unexpected end of file
Devops.solution: Garbage/Corrupted gzip package, try re-running or reach out to DevOps if this is consistent.
Garbage/Corrupted tar package, try re-running or reach out to DevOps if this is consistent.
Corrupted git workspace, re-try or reach out to DevOps.
Wrong package being fetched in build, investigate and fix compilation. Reach out to DevOps if unsure.

Devops.failure: docker.errors.BuildError: failed to get destination image
Devops.solution: Bad image reference in Dockerfile, use correct image or reach out to DevOps.

Devops.failure: docker.errors.APIError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error ("invalid reference format")
Devops.solution: Internal server (Artifactory) hosting images landed in some issue, reach out to IT/DevOps
